[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up anime-style illustration shows a red-haired character covering part of their face with an open hand, with a warm orange background.

Main Subject:
A stylized person with light skin and long, layered red hair occupies most of the frame, facing forward with closed or lowered eyelids and a calm expression. They raise one hand toward the camera, fingers spread, partially covering the lower half of their face. A purple, gem-like eye is visible on the right side near the edge of the character’s head, along with gold decorative elements around it.

Setting:
The background is an indoor-like, softly blurred warm-toned backdrop in orange and brown hues, with no clearly defined real-world location. The lighting appears warm and highlights the hair and face.

Visual Details:
The character’s hair is bright red with darker shading, sweeping bangs across the forehead and long strands framing the face. The hand in the foreground is pale and partially blocks the mouth and chin area. The character wears an orange and gold accessory or headpiece with angular, geometric shapes and small details, including purple circular elements. The color palette is dominated by red, orange, gold, and purple. The camera angle is very close and frontal, tightly cropped around the face and hand.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image is a close-up anime-style character portrait with red hair. The character’s open hand covers part of their face while warm orange and gold tones fill the background.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No visible text found in the screenshot.]

# Structured Version

- [No extractable text]

# Notes

The screenshot appears to be an image/illustration with no readable UI text, labels, or captions.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
Gambar ini menampilkan sebuah karakter anime dengan rambut merah muda panjang dan mata tertutup, tersenyum sambil menutup mulutnya dengan tangan. Karakter tersebut mengenakan anting-anting emas besar dengan batu ungu di dalamnya dan terlihat mengenakan pakaian yang terbuka di bagian bahu. Latar belakang gambar tampak berwarna hangat dan sedikit buram, memberikan kesan fokus pada karakter. Tidak ada konten NSFW atau ketelanjangan dalam gambar ini.
